title: Technoblade Pigs for Faithful 32x
description: Adds the iconic Technoblade crown to pigs while maintaining the pig's texture for Faithful 32x users.
body:
Adds Technoblade’s iconic crown to pigs, styled to match the Faithful 32x texture pack. Requires Entity Model Features or OptiFine, as it uses a second layer for the crown.

Crown model by [TripleLuxen](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/texture-packs/technoblade-pig). If you're not using Faithful, definitely check out their resource pack.

Looking for a higher-res version? Check out the 64x edition [here](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/technoblade-pigs-for-faithful-64x).

![In-game screenshot with the texture pack; a pig with a crown on](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e1b13dedda5c312c34d071c82ad45e130a96caed_0.webp)
